camera.title: Scan with Pickly

camera.picklyNowDesc: Every scan starts fast with Pickly Now. After your score lands, tap <1>Full Analysis</1> on the result screen whenever you want Pickly Deep detail on the same photo.
camera.dailyLimit: Daily limit reached. Try again tomorrow!
